flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Tennessee Southern are 20% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.9k vs $48.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The University of Tennessee Southern fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The University of Tennessee Southern rose 41% between 2021 and 2024 (54.6% → 77.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Tennessee Southern rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (741 → 864).
